# HADocs v0.17 Professional UI

This update makes the desktop app feel more like a complete product.

## Added

- Robust logo loading from source and PyInstaller bundles.
- Optional Pillow support for better PNG logo handling.
- Larger branded sidebar.
- Health Score gauge.
- Top issues preview.
- Token hidden from the main dashboard.
- Connection summary card.
- Technical log hidden by default.
- Improved About dialog.

## Notes

The GUI still uses Tkinter/ttk, so it remains lightweight and easy to package.
